vocab.meaning: giữ chặt lấy (một khoảnh khắc hoặc kỷ niệm)
vocab.example: For me, capturing a landscape is a way to hold onto the fleeting feeling of peace I experience in nature.

vocab.meaning: cất giấu, để ở một nơi khuất/bí mật
vocab.example: I adore finding little-known spots tucked away in the mountains that haven't been over-photographed by tourists.

vocab.meaning: làm nổi bật, làm lộ rõ (vẻ đẹp hoặc đặc điểm)
vocab.example: The post-rain clarity really brings out the deep greens and textures of the valley, making for a stunning photo.

vocab.meaning: lọc bỏ, loại bỏ (những yếu tố không mong muốn)
vocab.example: When I'm framing a shot, I try to filter out any modern eyesores like power lines to keep the view looking pristine.

vocab.meaning: thưởng ngoạn, ngắm nhìn bao quát
vocab.example: Before I reach for my camera, I like to just stand there and take in the sheer scale of the scenery.
The most breathtaking views I’ve ever shot were those I happened to stumble across while wandering aimlessly.
You never know when a perfect rainbow might pop up, so I always keep my gear ready when the weather is unpredictable.
I've always been drawn to coastal scenery because of the dramatic way the waves crash against the cliffs.
I look for a singular element, like a red barn in a green field, to make the landscape stand out in the frame.

vocab.meaning: làm rạng rỡ, làm sáng bừng lên
vocab.example: A few rays of sunlight peeking through the clouds can instantly brighten up an otherwise gloomy mountain vista.
